Package aura.core

Class AuraBox<T extends AuraBox<T>>

java.lang.Object
java.awt.Component
java.awt.Container
javax.swing.JComponent
javax.swing.JPanel
aura.core.AuraBox<T>
All Implemented Interfaces:
ImageObserver, MenuContainer, Serializable, Accessible
Direct Known Subclasses:
AuraButton, AuraContainer, AuraImage, AuraInput, AuraMultiText, AuraSpacer, AuraText, Layout
public abstract class AuraBox<T extends AuraBox<T>> extends JPanel
AuraBox es la clase central de Aura proporciona carateristicas de renderizado avanzadas
See Also:
